facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Locals don't. Tram Tram's Bánh Mì has 501 reviews and a 4.5★ rating for a reason. Crispy bread, loaded fillings, fast service. This is the bánh mì stop on Phu Quoc that the resort crowd never finds. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch how fast they build this bánh mì. Tram Tram's Bánh Mì on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.5 stars, 501 reviews, zero tourists in the queue. This is the move.

instagram.caption: Locals don't mention Tram Tram's Bánh Mì. 4.5★, 501 reviews, no tourist queue. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Bánh mì built in 60 seconds flat. Tram Tram's Bánh Mì, Phu Quoc. The spot locals keep off the tourist maps.

tiktok.caption: The bánh mì spot locals are keeping quiet on Phu Quoc. 4.5★ & 501 reviews. #PhuQuoc #BanhMi #VietnamFood #PhuQuocFood #TravelTips
